instructions: Open an agent and select Topics in the left navigation.
Make sure the system topics and at least one custom topic are visible.
Open the '+ Add a topic' menu so 'From blank' is visible.
Close any teaching tips, banners, or popovers.
Open a custom topic and select the Trigger node.
Show 5-8 trigger phrases entered in the node.
The authoring canvas chrome must be visible.
Add a Question node and open its properties pane.
Set Identify to a prebuilt entity (for example City and country).
Show the 'Save user response as' variable mapping.
